description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named compiler-build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: build and test-compiler. The build job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-18.04, windows-2019, and macos-10.15, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.7, installs Conan and system requirements, configures CMake, builds the project, and uploads a build artifact. The test-compiler job runs on the same matrix, checks out the code, installs system requirements and Python packages, downloads the build artifact, and runs tests with Pytest.
